name: bridge
description: Universal GSD + ECC orchestrator for Claude Code — wraps every /gsd: command with automatic stack-driven quality gates

plugins.name: bridge
plugins.description: Universal GSD + ECC orchestrator. Wraps every /gsd: command with automatic ECC quality gates. Auto-detects project stack (Python, Go, Kotlin, Node, Java, Rust, Swift, React Native). Auto-installs GSD + ECC if missing.
